summary: Strengthened top-level command-bar and section hierarchy with cleaner spacing and a more premium command-center feel.
Made active position cards the visual focal point with stronger card surfaces, clearer hierarchy, larger PnL emphasis, more legible status/action chips, and improved spacing.
Kept diagnostics visually quieter by toning down shadow stat/card surfaces rather than expanding them.
Improved empty-state presentation so the page still feels intentional when no live paper positions exist.
Improved mobile readability with better stacking, spacing, and top-bar/card behavior on narrow screens.

visual_ux_improvements: sticky command bar upgraded with gradient/backdrop-like weight and stronger spacing
section spacing and title weight increased for clearer hierarchy
active cards upgraded with stronger surface, rounder corners, subtle lift, and larger scan hierarchy
status/action pills made cleaner and more readable
live PnL enlarged for stronger focal emphasis
stat boxes refined for cleaner TP/SL/current/entry readability
shadow stats/cards visually softened so diagnostics feel secondary
empty state restyled as intentional bordered callout instead of dead space
mobile layout improved: command stats wrap cleanly, cards stack better, badges align better on small screens

risk_notes: No truth-layer ownership changes were introduced in this style pass.
No backend behavior or data semantics were changed.
This pass stayed close to the current structure to avoid truth regression.
